channel.title: Microblog on Joe Muller's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Microblog on Joe Muller's Blog

item.title: Microblog 11 04 2024
item.description: November 4, 2024 The Conversation Cost AI copilots make you fast until they don’t. There is a very real “conversation cost” that accrues as you use AI tools and its best illustrated with an example. Say you want to create a two-sided marketplace for recruiters and job seekers. Standing in the middle of the greenfield, you can erect what appear to be finished structures in an incredibly short amount of time with AI.
